question: What does Northbeam's DPA say about retaining customer data?
reference_answer: The DPA states Northbeam processes customer data on documented instructions and deletes it within 30 days of termination [S1].

must_support.claim: Northbeam's DPA guarantees that "Northbeam retains no customer data at any time."
must_support.supporting_quote: Northbeam processes customer personal data only on documented instructions and deletes such data within 30 days following termination of the agreement.

must_not_assert: The DPA guarantees that "Northbeam retains no customer data at any time."
